title: bromus hordeaceus var. glabratus
intro: Bromus hordeaceus var. glabratus, also known as smooth-brome, is a type of grass in the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. Smooth-brome can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat various ailments.
